Essential Travel Chinese

Survival Chinese for the Forbidden City

故宫汉语速成

Master the essentials in 15 minutes. Greetings, tickets, directions, and key phrases — with audio pronunciation for every word.

0.85x
Tip: Tap the red button to hear pronunciation
1

Greetings & Politeness

Start every interaction right. These phrases will carry you through any situation at the Forbidden City.

Greeting
你好
Nǐ hǎo
Hello
Politeness
谢谢
Xièxie
Thank you
Politeness
对不起
Duìbuqǐ
Sorry / Excuse me
Response
没关系
Méi guānxi
It's okay / No problem
Politeness
请
Qǐng
Please
Greeting
再见
Zàijiàn
Goodbye
Useful
我不会说中文
Wǒ bú huì shuō Zhōngwén
I don't speak Chinese
Useful
你会说英语吗
Nǐ huì shuō Yīngyǔ ma
Do you speak English?
2

Forbidden City Essentials

Key words you'll see on signs, tickets, and maps around the palace complex.

Place
故宫
Gùgōng
The Forbidden City
Ticket
门票
Ménpiào
Entrance ticket
Direction
入口
Rùkǒu
Entrance
Direction
出口
Chūkǒu
Exit
Facility
洗手间
Xǐshǒujiān
Restroom
Shopping
多少钱
Duōshao qián
How much?
Question
洗手间在哪里
Xǐshǒujiān zài nǎlǐ
Where is the restroom?
Phrase
我想去...
Wǒ xiǎng qù...
I want to go to...
Place
午门
Wǔmén
Meridian Gate (main entrance)
Place
太和殿
Tàihé Diàn
Hall of Supreme Harmony
Place
保和殿
Bǎohé Diàn
Hall of Preserving Harmony
Place
神武门
Shénwǔ Mén
Gate of Divine Might (north exit)
3

Practical Dialogues

Real conversations for buying tickets, asking directions, and getting help.

🎫 Buying a Ticket
You
你好，我要一张门票。
Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào yī zhāng ménpiào.
Hello, I'd like one ticket.
Staff
好的，请出示您的护照。
Hǎo de, qǐng chūshì nín de hùzhào.
Okay, please show your passport.
You
给你。多少钱？
Gěi nǐ. Duōshao qián?
Here you are. How much?
Staff
六十元。
Liùshí yuán.
Sixty yuan.
You
谢谢！
Xièxie!
Thank you!
🧭 Asking for Directions
You
请问，太和殿怎么走？
Qǐng wèn, Tàihé Diàn zěnme zǒu?
Excuse me, how do I get to the Hall of Supreme Harmony?
Staff
一直往前走，然后右转。
Yīzhí wǎng qián zǒu, ránhòu yòu zhuǎn.
Go straight ahead, then turn right.
You
远吗？
Yuǎn ma?
Is it far?
Staff
不远，大概五分钟。
Bù yuǎn, dàgài wǔ fēnzhōng.
Not far, about five minutes.
You
明白了，谢谢！
Míngbai le, xièxie!
Understood, thank you!
📸 Taking a Photo
You
请问，可以帮我拍照吗？
Qǐng wèn, kěyǐ bāng wǒ pāizhào ma?
Excuse me, could you take a photo for me?
Stranger
当然可以！
Dāngrán kěyǐ!
Of course!
You
谢谢！请按这里。
Xièxie! Qǐng àn zhèlǐ.
Thanks! Please press here.
4

Numbers & Prices

Tap any number to hear it pronounced. Essential for prices, times, and quantities.

一
yī
1
二
èr
2
三
sān
3
四
sì
4
五
wǔ
5
六
liù
6
七
qī
7
八
bā
8
九
jiǔ
9
十
shí
10
百
bǎi
100
千
qiān
1,000
5

Made for travelers visiting the Forbidden City · Good luck on your journey!
